name: Multi Blog
tagline: Multi-tenant blogging platform with custom domains and AI editor
description: A multi-tenant blogging platform that allows users to create sites with custom domains and subdomains. Features an AI-powered WYSIWYG editor (Novel), image uploads via Vercel Blob, rate limiting with Upstash, and ISR for fast cached content delivery. Built on the Vercel Platforms Starter Kit architecture.
highlights: Multi-tenant architecture with custom domain and subdomain support via Vercel Domains API
AI-powered Notion-style rich-text editor with Novel
Image uploads with drag & drop backed by Vercel Blob
Edge-cached blog posts with ISR and on-demand revalidation
